summary: Fix public submit review issues for cart preview query resolution, deterministic cache keys, and generic approval wording.
reason: Greptile and library CI flagged production-path issues after the first submission: cart preview sent query file names as GraphQL documents, GET cache keys depended on map iteration order, and a live-order flag description embedded a maintainer handle.
validated_outcome: go test ./... and scoped govulncheck passed before updating PR #773.
